scripts.frontend: concurrently -k -n REACT,ELECTRON, -c blue,green "npm run dev --prefix frontend" "npm run start --prefix electron"
scripts.dev: concurrently -k -n REACT,ELECTRON,EXPRESS,PORTAL,ADMIN -c blue,green,yellow,magenta,cyan "npm run dev --prefix frontend" "npm run start --prefix electron" "npm run dev --prefix express-backend" "npm run dev --prefix web-portal" "npm run dev --prefix web-admin"
